description_long: This bird features a sleek, streamlined body with predominantly dark gray to black plumage covering its wings, back, and tail. Its head and upper chest are marked by a striking golden-yellow coloration that contrasts sharply with the darker body. The beak is pointed and conical, well-suited for seed eating, and is a muted gray shade. The wings are long and smooth, with subtle lighter patches near the lower edge, and the tail is straight and slightly rounded at the tip. The legs are short and dark, mostly obscured by the body in these views. The overall appearance suggests a bird adapted for perching and foraging in open urban or park environments.
description: A medium-sized bird with a golden-yellow head and dark gray-black body, featuring a pointed beak and smooth, streamlined wings and tail.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's golden-yellow head, dark gray body, and pointed beak, with the full length of the wings and tail visible.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the smooth, dark wings and tail, with only a hint of the yellow head visible at the front.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, again showing the yellow head, dark body, and the bird's streamlined profile.
description_view_3: Frontal view focusing on the pointed beak and the golden-yellow coloration of the head, with the body tapering away behind.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid dark body with a sharply contrasting golden-yellow head and upper chest, subtle lighter patches on wings
